pros: Markdown-first publishing flow engineers actually enjoy
Paid articles and books open up monetization for authors
Public user and feed APIs enable aggregation apps
Cleaner UX than Qiita for serious long-form content
cons: API surface is narrower than Qiita's
No OAuth for write operations via API
Content volume still trails Qiita by a wide margin
review.verdict: The Japanese engineer's writing platform of choice for quality long-form, if you're comfortable with a limited public API.
review.best_for: Japanese engineers publishing long-form articles or paid technical books.
review.not_for: Global audiences or apps needing rich write APIs and OAuth write flows.
